2:T1ca30,<style>
  :root {
    --paper: #FAF4EA;
    --paper-2: #F2E8D8;
    --ink: #17110F;
    --ink-soft: #5A4F49;
    --pink: #FF2D6B;
    --pink-deep: #D91752;
    --marigold: #FFB800;
    --line: #E4D8C6;
    --accent: #FF2D6B;      /* SEO green */
    --accent-deep: #D91752;
    --font: "Poppins", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
  }
  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
  body { background: var(--paper); color: var(--ink); font-family: var(--font); line-height: 1.6; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; overflow-x: hidden; }
  ::selection { background: var(--accent); color: #fff; }
  a { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; }
  img, svg { display: block; max-width: 100%; }

  /* HEADER */
  .aw-header { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 200; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 16px 40px; background: rgba(250,244,234,0.9); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 2px solid var(--ink); }
  .aw-logo { font-weight: 800; font-size: 28px; letter-spacing: -1px; line-height: 1; }
  .aw-logo .dot { color: var(--pink); }
  .aw-nav { display: flex; gap: 28px; align-items: center; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; }
  .aw-nav a { position: relative; padding: 4px 0; }
  .aw-nav a::after { content:""; position:absolute; left:0; bottom:-2px; width:0; height:2px; background:var(--accent); transition:width .22s; }
  .aw-nav a:hover::after { width:100%; }
  .aw-cta { font-family: var(--font); font-weight: 700; font-size: 14.5px; background: var(--ink); color: var(--paper); padding: 12px 22px; border-radius: 40px; border: 2px solid var(--ink); cursor: pointer; transition: background .2s, color .2s, transform .1s; white-space: nowrap; }
  .aw-cta:hover { background: var(--pink); border-color: var(--pink); color:#fff; }
  .aw-cta:active { transform: translateY(1px); }
  .aw-burger { display: none; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; padding: 8px; }
  .aw-burger span { width: 26px; height: 2.5px; background: var(--ink); border-radius: 2px; }
  .aw-mobile-nav { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: var(--paper); z-index: 250; padding: 96px 26px 30px; display: none; }
  .aw-mobile-nav.open { display: block; }
  .aw-mobile-nav a { display: block; font-weight: 700; font-size: 26px; padding: 15px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line); }
  .aw-mobile-nav .aw-btn-primary { margin-top: 26px; width: 100%; }
  body.menu-open { overflow: hidden; }

  /* buttons */
  .aw-btn-primary { font-family:var(--font); font-weight:700; font-size:15px; background:var(--pink); color:#fff; padding:16px 30px; border-radius:40px; border:2px solid var(--pink); cursor:pointer; transition:background .2s, transform .1s; }
  .aw-btn-primary:hover { background:var(--pink-deep); border-color:var(--pink-deep); }
  .aw-btn-primary:active { transform:translateY(1px); }
  .aw-btn-ghost { font-family:var(--font); font-weight:700; font-size:15px; background:transparent; color:var(--ink); padding:16px 30px; border-radius:40px; border:2px solid var(--ink); cursor:pointer; transition:background .2s, color .2s; }
  .aw-btn-ghost:hover { background:var(--ink); color:var(--paper); }

  /* HERO */
  .aw-hero { padding: 44px 40px 34px; max-width: 1320px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .aw-crumb { font-weight:600; font-size:13.5px; color:var(--ink-soft); margin-bottom:22px; }
  .aw-crumb a:hover { color:var(--accent); }
  .aw-crumb .sep { margin:0 8px; opacity:.5; }
  .aw-crumb .cur { color:var(--accent); }
  .aw-kick { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; font-weight:700; font-size:13.5px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:2px; color:var(--accent-deep); margin-bottom:20px; }
  .aw-kick span { width:32px; height:2px; background:var(--accent-deep); }
  .aw-hero h1 { font-weight: 900; font-size: clamp(52px, 12vw, 150px); line-height: 0.92; letter-spacing: -3px; text-transform: uppercase; }
  .aw-hero h1 .mark { position: relative; display: inline-block; z-index: 1; }
  .aw-hero h1 .mark::before { content:""; position:absolute; left:-8px; right:-8px; top:16%; bottom:14%; background:var(--marigold); transform: skew(-8deg) rotate(-1.5deg); z-index:-1; }
  .aw-hero-row { display:flex; align-items:flex-end; justify-content:space-between; gap:40px; margin-top:34px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
  .aw-hero-sub { font-size: clamp(17px, 2vw, 21px); font-weight:500; max-width:600px; color:var(--ink-soft); }
  .aw-hero-sub b { color: var(--ink); font-weight:700; }
  .aw-hero-actions { display:flex; gap:12px; flex-wrap:wrap; }

  /* STATS */
  .aw-stats { background:var(--ink); color:var(--paper); }
  .aw-stats-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr); gap:20px; }
  .aw-stat .num { font-weight:900; font-size:clamp(40px,5.5vw,68px); line-height:0.9; letter-spacing:-2px; color:var(--accent); }
  .aw-stat:nth-child(2) .num { color:var(--marigold); }
  .aw-stat:nth-child(3) .num { color:#4FD1C5; }
  .aw-stat:nth-child(4) .num { color:var(--pink); }
  .aw-stat .lbl { font-size:14.5px; color:#C7BAA8; font-weight:600; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.5px; margin-top:12px; }

  /* SHELL */
  .aw-wrap { max-width:1320px; margin:0 auto; padding:88px 40px; }
  .aw-eyebrow { font-weight:700; font-size:13px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:2.5px; color:var(--accent-deep); margin-bottom:16px; }
  .aw-h2 { font-weight:900; font-size:clamp(32px,5vw,64px); line-height:1.0; letter-spacing:-2px; text-transform:uppercase; }
  .aw-h2 .g { color:var(--accent); }
  .aw-h2 .pink { color:var(--pink); }

  /* INTRO */
  .aw-intro-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.1fr 1fr; gap:56px; align-items:start; }
  .aw-intro-body p { font-size:18px; color:var(--ink-soft); margin-bottom:16px; }
  .aw-intro-body p b { color:var(--ink); font-weight:700; }

  /* SERVICES CARDS */
  .aw-serv-head { margin-bottom:44px; max-width:720px; }
  .aw-serv-head p { font-size:17px; color:var(--ink-soft); font-weight:500; margin-top:14px; }
  .aw-cards { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:22px; }
  .aw-card { background:#fff; border:2px solid var(--ink); border-radius:16px; padding:28px 26px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; transition:transform .2s, box-shadow .2s; }
  .aw-card:hover { transform:translateY(-5px); box-shadow:9px 9px 0 var(--accent); }
  .aw-card .ic { width:48px; height:48px; border-radius:12px; background:var(--accent); color:#fff; font-weight:900; font-size:20px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; margin-bottom:18px; }
  .aw-card h3 { font-weight:800; font-size:21px; letter-spacing:-.4px; margin-bottom:10px; }
  .aw-card p { font-size:15px; color:var(--ink-soft); margin-bottom:16px; }
  .aw-card ul { list-style:none; margin-top:auto; }
  .aw-card li { font-size:14px; font-weight:500; color:var(--ink); padding:6px 0 6px 22px; position:relative; }
  .aw-card li::before { content:""; position:absolute; left:2px; top:12px; width:9px; height:9px; border-radius:3px; background:var(--accent); }

  /* WHY */
  .aw-why { background:var(--ink); color:var(--paper); }
  .aw-why .aw-eyebrow { color:var(--marigold); }
  .aw-why .aw-h2 { color:var(--paper); margin-bottom:46px; }
  .aw-why-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); gap:2px; background:#3A312C; border:2px solid #3A312C; }
  .aw-why-cell { background:var(--ink); padding:32px 30px; }
  .aw-why-cell .n { font-weight:900; font-size:20px; color:var(--accent); margin-bottom:12px; }
  .aw-why-cell:nth-child(2) .n { color:var(--marigold); }
  .aw-why-cell:nth-child(3) .n { color:#4FD1C5; }
  .aw-why-cell:nth-child(4) .n { color:var(--pink); }
  .aw-why-cell h3 { font-weight:800; font-size:20px; letter-spacing:-.3px; margin-bottom:9px; color:var(--paper); }
  .aw-why-cell p { font-size:15.5px; color:#C7BAA8; }

  /* PROCESS */
  .aw-proc .aw-h2 { margin-bottom:46px; }
  .aw-proc-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr); border-top:2px solid var(--ink); border-left:2px solid var(--ink); }
  .aw-step { padding:28px 22px 32px; border-right:2px solid var(--ink); border-bottom:2px solid var(--ink); }
  .aw-step .sn { font-weight:900; font-size:15px; color:#fff; width:38px; height:38px; border-radius:50%; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:var(--accent); margin-bottom:18px; }
  .aw-step h3 { font-weight:800; font-size:19px; margin-bottom:8px; letter-spacing:-.3px; }
  .aw-step p { font-size:15px; color:var(--ink-soft); }

  /* FAQ */
  .aw-faq-grid { max-width:880px; margin:0 auto; border-top:2px solid var(--ink); }
  .aw-faq-item { border-bottom:2px solid var(--ink); }
  .aw-faq-q { width:100%; text-align:left; background:none; border:none; font-family:var(--font); font-weight:700; font-size:clamp(17px,2.1vw,21px); color:var(--ink); padding:24px 50px 24px 0; cursor:pointer; position:relative; letter-spacing:-.3px; }
  .aw-faq-q::after { content:"+"; position:absolute; right:6px; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%); font-size:30px; font-weight:300; color:var(--accent); transition:transform .25s; line-height:1; }
  .aw-faq-item.open .aw-faq-q::after { transform:translateY(-50%) rotate(45deg); }
  .aw-faq-a { max-height:0; overflow:hidden; transition:max-height .32s ease; }
  .aw-faq-a p { font-size:16.5px; color:var(--ink-soft); padding:0 46px 26px 0; }

  /* CONTACT */
  .aw-contact { background:var(--ink); color:var(--paper); }
  .aw-contact-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:56px; align-items:start; }
  .aw-contact-left .aw-eyebrow { color:var(--marigold); }
  .aw-contact-left h2 { font-weight:900; font-size:clamp(34px,4.8vw,64px); line-height:0.98; letter-spacing:-2px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--paper); }
  .aw-contact-left h2 .pink { color:var(--pink); }
  .aw-contact-left .lead { font-size:18px; color:#C7BAA8; margin:20px 0 30px; font-weight:500; }
  .aw-contact-info { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:14px; }
  .aw-ci { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:14px; }
  .aw-ci .ico { width:44px; height:44px; border-radius:11px; background:#241C19; border:1.5px solid #3A312C; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; flex-shrink:0; color:var(--marigold); font-weight:800; }
  .aw-ci span { color:#D6CABA; font-weight:500; font-size:15px; }
  .aw-ci b { display:block; color:var(--paper); font-weight:700; font-size:16px; }
  .aw-map { margin-top:20px; border-radius:16px; overflow:hidden; border:2px solid #3A312C; }
  .aw-map iframe { width:100%; height:200px; border:0; display:block; }
  .aw-contact-card { background:var(--paper); border-radius:20px; padding:38px 34px; text-align:center; }
  .aw-contact-card .cc-icon { width:60px; height:60px; border-radius:16px; background:var(--accent); color:#fff; font-size:28px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; margin:0 auto 20px; }
  .aw-contact-card h3 { font-weight:900; font-size:clamp(24px,3vw,32px); line-height:1.05; letter-spacing:-1px; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:12px; color:var(--ink); }
  .aw-contact-card > p { font-size:16px; color:var(--ink-soft); margin:0 auto 26px; max-width:360px; }
  .aw-contact-card .aw-btn-primary { width:100%; }
  .aw-contact-card .cc-or { font-size:13px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:1.5px; color:var(--ink-soft); margin:24px 0 14px; font-weight:600; }
  .aw-contact-card .cc-links { display:flex; justify-content:center; gap:10px; }
  .aw-contact-card .cc-links a { flex:1; font-weight:700; font-size:14.5px; color:var(--ink); border:2px solid var(--ink); border-radius:40px; padding:11px 0; transition:background .2s,color .2s; }
  .aw-contact-card .cc-links a:hover { background:var(--ink); color:var(--paper); }

  /* FOOTER */
  .aw-footer { background:var(--ink); color:var(--paper); }
  .aw-footer-top { max-width:1320px; margin:0 auto; padding:68px 40px 40px; display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.6fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap:40px; }
  .aw-footer-brand .aw-logo { font-size:44px; color:var(--paper); margin-bottom:16px; }
  .aw-footer-brand p { font-size:15px; color:#C7BAA8; max-width:300px; }
  .aw-fcol h4 { font-size:13px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:1.5px; color:var(--marigold); margin-bottom:16px; font-weight:700; }
  .aw-fcol a { display:block; font-size:15px; color:#D6CABA; padding:5px 0; font-weight:500; transition:color .15s; }
  .aw-fcol a:hover { color:#fff; }
  .aw-footer-bottom { max-width:1320px; margin:0 auto; padding:22px 40px; border-top:1px solid #3A312C; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:20px; flex-wrap:wrap; font-size:13.5px; color:#9C8F82; }
  .aw-social { display:flex; gap:11px; margin-top:22px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
  .aw-social a { width:42px; height:42px; border-radius:50%; border:1.5px solid #3A312C; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; color:#D6CABA; transition:background .2s,color .2s,border-color .2s, transform .12s; }
  .aw-social a:hover { background:var(--pink); border-color:var(--pink); color:#fff; transform:translateY(-2px); }
  .aw-social svg { width:18px; height:18px; fill:currentColor; }

  /* MODAL */
  .aw-modal { position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:400; display:none; align-items:center; justify-content:center; padding:24px; }
  .aw-modal.open { display:flex; }
  .aw-modal-overlay { position:absolute; inset:0; background:rgba(23,17,15,0.62); backdrop-filter:blur(4px); }
  .aw-modal-box { position:relative; z-index:1; background:var(--paper); border-radius:22px; width:100%; max-width:540px; max-height:92vh; overflow-y:auto; padding:36px; border:2px solid var(--ink); animation:aw-pop .3s cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1); }
  @keyframes aw-pop { from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(20px) scale(.97);} to { opacity:1; transform:none;} }
  .aw-modal-close { position:absolute; top:16px; right:16px; width:38px; height:38px; border-radius:50%; border:2px solid var(--ink); background:var(--paper); font-size:22px; line-height:1; cursor:pointer; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; transition:background .2s,color .2s; z-index:2; }
  .aw-modal-close:hover { background:var(--pink); border-color:var(--pink); color:#fff; }
  .aw-modal-head { margin-bottom:22px; padding-right:34px; }
  .aw-modal-head .aw-eyebrow { margin-bottom:10px; color:var(--accent-deep); }
  .aw-modal-head h3 { font-weight:900; font-size:clamp(26px,4vw,34px); line-height:1.02; letter-spacing:-1px; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:10px; }
  .aw-modal-head p { font-size:15.5px; color:var(--ink-soft); }
  .aw-field { margin-bottom:15px; }
  .aw-field label { display:block; font-weight:600; font-size:14px; color:var(--ink); margin-bottom:7px; }
  .aw-field input, .aw-field select, .aw-field textarea { width:100%; font-family:var(--font); font-size:15px; color:var(--ink); background:var(--paper-2); border:2px solid var(--line); border-radius:10px; padding:13px 15px; transition:border-color .2s; }
  .aw-field input:focus, .aw-field select:focus, .aw-field textarea:focus { outline:none; border-color:var(--accent); }
  .aw-field textarea { resize:vertical; min-height:88px; }
  .aw-two { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:15px; }
  .aw-form-submit { width:100%; font-family:var(--font); font-weight:700; font-size:16px; background:var(--pink); color:#fff; border:none; border-radius:40px; padding:16px; cursor:pointer; transition:background .2s; }
  .aw-form-submit:hover { background:var(--pink-deep); }
  .aw-form-note { text-align:center; font-size:12.5px; color:var(--ink-soft); margin-top:12px; }
  .aw-mform-success { display:none; text-align:center; padding:30px 10px; }
  .aw-mform-success.show { display:block; }
  .aw-mform-success .ok { font-weight:900; font-size:24px; color:var(--accent); margin-bottom:8px; }
  .aw-mform-success p { color:var(--ink-soft); font-size:15px; }

  /* WHATSAPP */
  .aw-wa { position:fixed; right:22px; bottom:22px; z-index:300; width:58px; height:58px; border-radius:50%; background:#25D366; box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(37,211,102,0.45); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; transition:transform .2s; }
  .aw-wa:hover { transform:scale(1.08); }
  .aw-wa svg { width:32px; height:32px; }

  /* RESPONSIVE */
  @media (max-width:1024px) {
    .aw-proc-grid { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); }
    .aw-wrap { padding:76px 34px; }
    .aw-cards { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); }
  }
  @media (max-width:980px) {
    .aw-nav { display:none; }
    .aw-header .aw-cta { display:none; }
    .aw-header { padding:12px 18px; }
    .aw-burger { display:flex; }
    .aw-intro-grid, .aw-contact-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; gap:34px; }
    .aw-stats-grid { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); gap:30px 20px; }
    .aw-footer-top { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; }
    .aw-footer-brand { grid-column:1 / -1; }
  }
  @media (max-width:640px) {
    .aw-hero, .aw-wrap, .aw-footer-top, .aw-footer-bottom { padding-left:20px; padding-right:20px; }
    .aw-wrap { padding-top:56px; padding-bottom:56px; }
    .aw-hero h1 { font-size:clamp(40px,13vw,72px); letter-spacing:-1.5px; }
    .aw-cards { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .aw-why-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .aw-proc-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .aw-stats-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .aw-two { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .aw-footer-top { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .aw-hero-actions { width:100%; }
    .aw-hero-actions .aw-btn-primary, .aw-hero-actions .aw-btn-ghost { flex:1; }
    .aw-modal-box { padding:26px 22px; }
    .aw-contact-card { padding:30px 24px; }
  }
  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .aw-faq-a { transition:none; }
    .aw-modal-box { animation:none; }
    * { scroll-behavior:auto; }
  }

  /* ===== extended page components ===== */
  .aw-svc-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:22px;margin-top:18px}
  .aw-svc-card{background:#fff;border:2px solid var(--ink);border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;transition:transform .18s,box-shadow .18s}
  .aw-svc-card:hover{transform:translateY(-5px);box-shadow:8px 8px 0 var(--ink)}
  .aw-svc-card .bar{height:8px;background:var(--sc)}
  .aw-svc-card .in{padding:26px 26px 28px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;flex:1}
  .aw-svc-card .num{font-weight:800;font-size:13px;color:var(--sc);letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:12px}
  .aw-svc-card h3{font-weight:800;font-size:22px;letter-spacing:-.5px;margin-bottom:10px}
  .aw-svc-card>.in>p{font-size:15px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:14px}
  .aw-svc-card .subs{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:20px}
  .aw-svc-card .go{margin-top:auto;font-weight:700;font-size:15px;color:var(--sc);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;transition:gap .2s}
  .aw-svc-card:hover .go{gap:12px}
  @media(max-width:900px){.aw-svc-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}}
  @media(max-width:600px){.aw-svc-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
  .aw-founder{display:grid;grid-template-columns:.82fr 1.18fr;gap:48px;align-items:center}
  .aw-founder .photo{border:3px solid var(--ink);border-radius:22px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:12px 12px 0 var(--accent)}
  .aw-founder .photo img{width:100%;display:block}
  .aw-founder h2{font-weight:900;font-size:clamp(30px,4.4vw,50px);line-height:1;letter-spacing:-1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px}
  .aw-founder .role{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent-deep);font-size:14px;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:20px}
  .aw-founder p{font-size:16.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:14px}
  @media(max-width:820px){.aw-founder{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:28px}.aw-founder .photo{max-width:340px}}
  .aw-values{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:20px;margin-top:18px}
  .aw-val{background:#fff;border:2px solid var(--ink);border-radius:16px;padding:26px 24px}
  .aw-val .vn{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:12px;background:var(--accent);color:#fff;font-weight:800;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:16px;font-size:17px}
  .aw-val h3{font-weight:800;font-size:19px;letter-spacing:-.3px;margin-bottom:8px}
  .aw-val p{font-size:14.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.55}
  @media(max-width:820px){.aw-values{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
  .aw-case-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:24px;margin-top:18px}
  .aw-case{background:#fff;border:2px solid var(--ink);border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;transition:transform .18s,box-shadow .18s}
  .aw-case:hover{transform:translateY(-5px);box-shadow:8px 8px 0 var(--ink)}
  .aw-case .top{padding:30px 30px 0}
  .aw-case .tag{display:inline-block;font-size:11.5px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#fff;background:var(--cc);border-radius:30px;padding:6px 14px;margin-bottom:18px}
  .aw-case h3{font-weight:800;font-size:24px;letter-spacing:-.5px;line-height:1.15;margin-bottom:10px}
  .aw-case .top p{font-size:15px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.55;margin-bottom:22px}
  .aw-case .results{display:flex;gap:30px;padding:22px 30px;border-top:2px solid var(--line);margin-top:auto;background:var(--paper-2)}
  .aw-case .results .r .n{font-weight:900;font-size:27px;color:var(--cc);letter-spacing:-1px;line-height:1}
  .aw-case .results .r .l{font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-soft);font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.4px;margin-top:5px}
  .aw-case a.cta-row{text-decoration:none;color:inherit;display:block}
  @media(max-width:760px){.aw-case-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
  .aw-method-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:20px;margin-top:18px}
  .aw-method{background:#fff;border:2px solid var(--ink);border-radius:16px;padding:32px 26px;text-align:center}
  .aw-method .mi{width:56px;height:56px;border-radius:14px;background:var(--accent);color:#fff;font-size:24px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 18px}
  .aw-method h3{font-weight:800;font-size:19px;margin-bottom:6px;letter-spacing:-.3px}
  .aw-method p{font-size:14px;color:var(--ink-soft);margin-bottom:14px}
  .aw-method a.big{font-weight:800;font-size:17px;color:var(--accent-deep);word-break:break-word}
  .aw-method a.big:hover{text-decoration:underline}
  @media(max-width:820px){.aw-method-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
  /* legal */
  .aw-legal{max-width:820px;margin:0 auto}
  .aw-legal .upd{font-size:14px;color:var(--ink-soft);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:34px}
  .aw-legal h2{font-weight:800;font-size:24px;letter-spacing:-.5px;margin:36px 0 14px}
  .aw-legal h3{font-weight:800;font-size:18px;margin:24px 0 10px}
  .aw-legal p{font-size:16px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.75;margin-bottom:14px}

  .aw-legal a:hover{text-decoration:underline}
  .aw-legal .note{background:var(--paper-2);border:2px solid var(--line);border-radius:14px;padding:18px 22px;font-size:14.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);margin-top:30px}
  /* utility (404 / thank you) */
  .aw-utility{max-width:640px;margin:0 auto;text-align:center;padding:30px 0 20px}
  .aw-utility .big404{font-weight:900;font-size:clamp(90px,20vw,180px);line-height:.9;letter-spacing:-4px;color:var(--accent)}
  .aw-utility .big404 .dot{color:var(--marigold)}
  .aw-utility h1{font-weight:900;font-size:clamp(30px,5vw,48px);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:-1.5px;margin:10px 0 16px;line-height:1}
  .aw-utility p{font-size:17px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:28px}
  .aw-utility .acts{display:flex;gap:12px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap}
  .aw-utility .tick{width:92px;height:92px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--accent);color:#fff;font-size:46px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 24px}
  /* blog */
  .aw-blog-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:26px;margin-top:18px}
  .aw-post{background:#fff;border:2px solid var(--ink);border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;transition:transform .18s,box-shadow .18s}
  .aw-post:hover{transform:translateY(-5px);box-shadow:8px 8px 0 var(--ink)}

  .aw-post .cover .cat{font-size:11.5px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#fff;background:rgba(0,0,0,.3);border-radius:30px;padding:6px 13px}
  .aw-post .pin{padding:22px 24px 26px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;flex:1}
  .aw-post .meta{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:10px}
  .aw-post h3{font-weight:800;font-size:20px;letter-spacing:-.4px;line-height:1.2;margin-bottom:10px}
  .aw-post p{font-size:14.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.55;margin-bottom:16px}
  .aw-post .rd{margin-top:auto;font-weight:700;font-size:14.5px;color:var(--accent-deep)}
  .aw-feat{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.1fr 1fr;background:#fff;border:2px solid var(--ink);border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden;margin-top:18px}
  .aw-feat .fcover{background:var(--accent);min-height:320px;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;padding:24px}
  .aw-feat .fcover .cat{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#fff;background:rgba(0,0,0,.3);border-radius:30px;padding:7px 15px}
  .aw-feat .fin{padding:40px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center}
  .aw-feat .fin .meta{font-size:13px;color:var(--ink-soft);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:14px}
  .aw-feat .fin h2{font-weight:900;font-size:clamp(26px,3.2vw,40px);letter-spacing:-1px;line-height:1.08;margin-bottom:16px}
  .aw-feat .fin p{font-size:16px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:22px}
  @media(max-width:820px){.aw-blog-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.aw-feat{grid-template-columns:1fr}.aw-feat .fcover{min-height:180px}}
  @media(min-width:821px) and (max-width:1050px){.aw-blog-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}}
  /* article */
  .aw-article{max-width:760px;margin:0 auto}
  .aw-article>p{font-size:18px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:20px}
  .aw-article h2{font-weight:800;font-size:28px;letter-spacing:-.8px;margin:38px 0 16px}
  .aw-article h3{font-weight:800;font-size:21px;margin:28px 0 12px}

  .aw-article blockquote{border-left:5px solid var(--accent);background:var(--paper-2);padding:20px 26px;margin:26px 0;border-radius:0 14px 14px 0}
  .aw-article blockquote p{font-size:20px;font-weight:600;color:var(--ink);line-height:1.5;margin:0}
  .aw-article strong{color:var(--ink);font-weight:700}

  .aw-postmeta .cat{color:#fff;background:var(--accent);border-radius:30px;padding:6px 14px;font-size:12px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px}
  .aw-authorbox{max-width:760px;margin:40px auto 0;background:#fff;border:2px solid var(--ink);border-radius:18px;padding:28px 30px;display:flex;gap:20px;align-items:center}
  .aw-authorbox .ab-av{width:64px;height:64px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--accent);color:#fff;font-weight:800;font-size:24px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0}
  .aw-authorbox h4{font-weight:800;font-size:18px;margin-bottom:4px}
  .aw-authorbox p{font-size:14.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.55}
  /* pricing */
  .aw-price-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:24px;margin-top:26px;align-items:stretch}

  <!-- HERO -->

      <p class="aw-hero-sub">Logistics is a competitive, trust-driven B2B sale. We help logistics and supply-chain brands get found, prove reliability, and generate the enquiries that turn into contracts. <b>Serious leads, real contracts.</b></p>

      <div><div class="aw-eyebrow">Logistics marketing</div><h2 class="aw-h2">A commodity market where trust wins.</h2></div>
      <div class="aw-intro-body"><p>Logistics can feel like a commodity, with buyers comparing on price and reliability. Standing out and proving you're the dependable choice is what actually wins contracts.</p><p>We build visibility and trust: ranking for the services buyers search, a credible presence that signals reliability, and lead-gen that brings qualified B2B enquiries to your team.</p></div>

  </section>

  <!-- FOUNDER NOTE -->
  <section class="aw-wrap aw-fnote">
    <div class="aw-fnote-inner">
      <div class="fn-photo"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Shubham Sharma, Founder and CEO of adwali"></div>
      <div class="fn-body">
        <div class="aw-eyebrow">A note from our founder</div>
        <h2 class="aw-h2">Why we <span class="g">do this.</span></h2>
        <p>I started adwali because I was tired of watching brands pour money into marketing that looked busy but changed nothing. I wanted to build the opposite: a team judged by real results, not activity.</p>
        <p>That's still what drives us. We treat every brand we work with like our own, and we genuinely care whether you grow. If that's the kind of team you're after, let's talk.</p>
        <div class="fn-sign"><div class="fn-mark"></div><div><div class="fn-name">Shubham Sharma</div><div class="fn-role">Founder and CEO, adwali</div></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- CONTACT -->
  <section class="aw-contact" id="contact">
    <div class="aw-wrap">
      <div class="aw-contact-grid">
        <div class="aw-contact-left">
          <div class="aw-eyebrow">Ready when you are</div>
          <h2>Ready to <span class="pink">grow?</span></h2>
          <p class="lead">Book a free consultation and we'll show you exactly how we'd grow your business in the Logistics space.</p>
          <div class="aw-contact-info">
            <div class="aw-ci"><div class="ico">&#9742;</div><div><span>Call or WhatsApp</span><b>+91 8005868694</b></div></div>
            <div class="aw-ci"><div class="ico">&#9993;</div><div><span>Email us</span><b>hello@adwali.com</b></div></div>
            <div class="aw-ci"><div class="ico">&#9873;</div><div><span>Visit us</span><b>11/335, Malviya Nagar, Jaipur</b></div></div>
          </div>
          <div class="aw-map"><iframe src="https://maps.google.com/maps?q=Malviya+Nagar,+Jaipur&t=&z=11&ie=UTF8&iwloc=&output=embed" loading="lazy" title="adwali office location"></iframe></div>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="aw-contact-card">
            <div class="cc-icon">&#9758;</div>
            <h3>Book a free consultation</h3>
            <p>Tell us about your business and goals. We'll show you what we'd do and what results to expect.</p>
            <button class="aw-btn-primary" data-openform>Book a Free Consultation</button>
            <div class="cc-or">or reach us directly</div>
            <div class="cc-links">
              <a href="tel:+918005868694">Call</a>
              <a href="https://wa.me/918005868694" target="_blank" rel="noopener">WhatsApp</a>
              <a href="mailto:hello@adwali.com">Email</a>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- FOOTER -->
  

  <!-- MODAL -->
  <div class="aw-modal" id="awModal" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="aw-modal-overlay" data-close></div>
    <div class="aw-modal-box" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="Book a free consultation">
      <button class="aw-modal-close" data-close aria-label="Close">&times;</button>
      <div class="aw-modal-head">
        <div class="aw-eyebrow">Free SEO consultation</div>
        <h3>Let's get you ranking.</h3>
        <p>Fill this in and we'll reach out within one business day with a look at where you stand.</p>
      </div>
      <form class="aw-form" id="awModalForm" onsubmit="return awFormSubmit(event)">
        <div class="aw-field"><label>Full name</label><input type="text" name="name" placeholder="Your name" required></div>
        <div class="aw-two">
          <div class="aw-field"><label>Email</label><input type="email" name="email" placeholder="you@company.com" required></div>
          <div class="aw-field"><label>Phone</label><input type="tel" name="phone" placeholder="+91" required></div>
        </div>
        <div class="aw-field"><label>Website URL</label><input type="text" name="website" placeholder="yoursite.com"></div>
        <div class="aw-field"><label>Tell us about your goals</label><textarea name="message" placeholder="What do you want to rank for?"></textarea></div>
        <button type="submit" class="aw-form-submit">Book a Free Consultation</button>
        <div class="aw-form-note">We reply within one business day. Your details stay private.</div>
      </form>
      <div class="aw-mform-success" id="awModalSuccess">
        <div class="ok">Thanks, we've got it!</div>
        <p>Our team will reach out within one business day to set up your free SEO consultation.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <a class="aw-wa" href="https://wa.me/918005868694" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="Chat on WhatsApp">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 32 32" fill="#fff"><path d="M16 3C9.4 3 4 8.4 4 15c0 2.1.5 4.1 1.6 5.9L4 29l8.3-1.6c1.7.9 3.6 1.4 5.7 1.4 6.6 0 12-5.4 12-12S22.6 3 16 3zm0 21.8c-1.8 0-3.5-.5-5-1.4l-.4-.2-4.9 1 1-4.8-.2-.4c-1-1.6-1.5-3.4-1.5-5.3C5 9.5 9.9 4.9 16 4.9c6.1 0 11 4.6 11 10.1S22.1 24.8 16 24.8zm5.6-7.6c-.3-.2-1.8-.9-2.1-1s-.5-.2-.7.2c-.2.3-.8 1-.9 1.2-.2.2-.3.2-.6.1-.3-.2-1.3-.5-2.5-1.5-.9-.8-1.5-1.8-1.7-2.1-.2-.3 0-.5.1-.6.1-.1.3-.3.4-.5.2-.2.2-.3.3-.5.1-.2 0-.4 0-.5s-.7-1.6-.9-2.2c-.2-.6-.5-.5-.7-.5h-.6c-.2 0-.5.1-.8.4-.3.3-1 1-1 2.5s1.1 2.9 1.2 3.1c.2.2 2.1 3.2 5.1 4.5.7.3 1.3.5 1.7.6.7.2 1.4.2 1.9.1.6-.1 1.8-.7 2-1.4.3-.7.3-1.3.2-1.4-.1-.1-.3-.2-.6-.3z"/></svg>
  </a>

  <script>
    function awFormSubmit(e){
      e.preventDefault();
      document.getElementById('awModalForm').style.display = 'none';
      document.getElementById('awModalSuccess').classList.add('show');
      return false;
    }
    (function(){
      var burger = document.getElementById('awBurger');
      var mnav = document.getElementById('awMobileNav');
      var modal = document.getElementById('awModal');
      function openForm(){ modal.classList.add('open'); modal.setAttribute('aria-hidden','false'); document.body.classList.add('modal-open'); }
      function closeForm(){ modal.classList.remove('open'); modal.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true'); document.body.classList.remove('modal-open'); }
      if (burger) burger.addEventListener('click', function(){
        var open = mnav.classList.toggle('open');
        document.body.classList.toggle('menu-open', open);
      });
      document.querySelectorAll('.aw-mn-link').forEach(function(l){
        l.addEventListener('click', function(){ mnav.classList.remove('open'); document.body.classList.remove('menu-open'); });
      });
      document.querySelectorAll('[data-openform]').forEach(function(b){
        b.addEventListener('click', function(e){ e.preventDefault(); openForm(); });
      });
      modal.querySelectorAll('[data-close]').forEach(function(c){ c.addEventListener('click', closeForm); });
      document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e){ if (e.key === 'Escape') closeForm(); });
      document.querySelectorAll('.aw-faq-q').forEach(function(q){
        q.addEventListener('click', function(){
          var item = q.parentElement;
          var a = item.querySelector('.aw-faq-a');
          var isOpen = item.classList.contains('open');
          document.querySelectorAll('.aw-faq-item').forEach(function(i){ i.classList.remove('open'); i.querySelector('.aw-faq-a').style.maxHeight = null; });
          if (!isOpen) { item.classList.add('open'); a.style.maxHeight = a.scrollHeight + 'px'; }
        });
      });
    })();
  </script>

6:T1b0e9,<style>
  :root {
    --paper: #FAF4EA;
    --paper-2: #F2E8D8;
    --ink: #17110F;
    --ink-soft: #5A4F49;
    --pink: #FF2D6B;
    --pink-deep: #D91752;
    --marigold: #FFB800;
    --line: #E4D8C6;
    --accent: #FF2D6B;      /* SEO green */
    --accent-deep: #D91752;
    --font: "Poppins", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
  }
  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
  body { background: var(--paper); color: var(--ink); font-family: var(--font); line-height: 1.6; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; overflow-x: hidden; }
  ::selection { background: var(--accent); color: #fff; }
  a { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; }
  img, svg { display: block; max-width: 100%; }

  /* HEADER */
  .aw-header { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 200; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 16px 40px; background: rgba(250,244,234,0.9); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 2px solid var(--ink); }
  .aw-logo { font-weight: 800; font-size: 28px; letter-spacing: -1px; line-height: 1; }
  .aw-logo .dot { color: var(--pink); }
  .aw-nav { display: flex; gap: 28px; align-items: center; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; }
  .aw-nav a { position: relative; padding: 4px 0; }
  .aw-nav a::after { content:""; position:absolute; left:0; bottom:-2px; width:0; height:2px; background:var(--accent); transition:width .22s; }
  .aw-nav a:hover::after { width:100%; }
  .aw-cta { font-family: var(--font); font-weight: 700; font-size: 14.5px; background: var(--ink); color: var(--paper); padding: 12px 22px; border-radius: 40px; border: 2px solid var(--ink); cursor: pointer; transition: background .2s, color .2s, transform .1s; white-space: nowrap; }
  .aw-cta:hover { background: var(--pink); border-color: var(--pink); color:#fff; }
  .aw-cta:active { transform: translateY(1px); }
  .aw-burger { display: none; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; padding: 8px; }
  .aw-burger span { width: 26px; height: 2.5px; background: var(--ink); border-radius: 2px; }
  .aw-mobile-nav { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: var(--paper); z-index: 250; padding: 96px 26px 30px; display: none; }
  .aw-mobile-nav.open { display: block; }
  .aw-mobile-nav a { display: block; font-weight: 700; font-size: 26px; padding: 15px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line); }
  .aw-mobile-nav .aw-btn-primary { margin-top: 26px; width: 100%; }
  body.menu-open { overflow: hidden; }

  /* buttons */
  .aw-btn-primary { font-family:var(--font); font-weight:700; font-size:15px; background:var(--pink); color:#fff; padding:16px 30px; border-radius:40px; border:2px solid var(--pink); cursor:pointer; transition:background .2s, transform .1s; }
  .aw-btn-primary:hover { background:var(--pink-deep); border-color:var(--pink-deep); }
  .aw-btn-primary:active { transform:translateY(1px); }
  .aw-btn-ghost { font-family:var(--font); font-weight:700; font-size:15px; background:transparent; color:var(--ink); padding:16px 30px; border-radius:40px; border:2px solid var(--ink); cursor:pointer; transition:background .2s, color .2s; }
  .aw-btn-ghost:hover { background:var(--ink); color:var(--paper); }

  /* HERO */
  .aw-hero { padding: 44px 40px 34px; max-width: 1320px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .aw-crumb { font-weight:600; font-size:13.5px; color:var(--ink-soft); margin-bottom:22px; }
  .aw-crumb a:hover { color:var(--accent); }
  .aw-crumb .sep { margin:0 8px; opacity:.5; }
  .aw-crumb .cur { color:var(--accent); }
  .aw-kick { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; font-weight:700; font-size:13.5px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:2px; color:var(--accent-deep); margin-bottom:20px; }
  .aw-kick span { width:32px; height:2px; background:var(--accent-deep); }
  .aw-hero h1 { font-weight: 900; font-size: clamp(52px, 12vw, 150px); line-height: 0.92; letter-spacing: -3px; text-transform: uppercase; }
  .aw-hero h1 .mark { position: relative; display: inline-block; z-index: 1; }
  .aw-hero h1 .mark::before { content:""; position:absolute; left:-8px; right:-8px; top:16%; bottom:14%; background:var(--marigold); transform: skew(-8deg) rotate(-1.5deg); z-index:-1; }
  .aw-hero-row { display:flex; align-items:flex-end; justify-content:space-between; gap:40px; margin-top:34px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
  .aw-hero-sub { font-size: clamp(17px, 2vw, 21px); font-weight:500; max-width:600px; color:var(--ink-soft); }
  .aw-hero-sub b { color: var(--ink); font-weight:700; }
  .aw-hero-actions { display:flex; gap:12px; flex-wrap:wrap; }

  /* STATS */
  .aw-stats { background:var(--ink); color:var(--paper); }
  .aw-stats-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr); gap:20px; }
  .aw-stat .num { font-weight:900; font-size:clamp(40px,5.5vw,68px); line-height:0.9; letter-spacing:-2px; color:var(--accent); }
  .aw-stat:nth-child(2) .num { color:var(--marigold); }
  .aw-stat:nth-child(3) .num { color:#4FD1C5; }
  .aw-stat:nth-child(4) .num { color:var(--pink); }
  .aw-stat .lbl { font-size:14.5px; color:#C7BAA8; font-weight:600; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.5px; margin-top:12px; }

  /* SHELL */
  .aw-wrap { max-width:1320px; margin:0 auto; padding:88px 40px; }
  .aw-eyebrow { font-weight:700; font-size:13px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:2.5px; color:var(--accent-deep); margin-bottom:16px; }
  .aw-h2 { font-weight:900; font-size:clamp(32px,5vw,64px); line-height:1.0; letter-spacing:-2px; text-transform:uppercase; }
  .aw-h2 .g { color:var(--accent); }
  .aw-h2 .pink { color:var(--pink); }

  /* INTRO */
  .aw-intro-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.1fr 1fr; gap:56px; align-items:start; }
  .aw-intro-body p { font-size:18px; color:var(--ink-soft); margin-bottom:16px; }
  .aw-intro-body p b { color:var(--ink); font-weight:700; }

  /* SERVICES CARDS */
  .aw-serv-head { margin-bottom:44px; max-width:720px; }
  .aw-serv-head p { font-size:17px; color:var(--ink-soft); font-weight:500; margin-top:14px; }
  .aw-cards { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:22px; }
  .aw-card { background:#fff; border:2px solid var(--ink); border-radius:16px; padding:28px 26px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; transition:transform .2s, box-shadow .2s; }
  .aw-card:hover { transform:translateY(-5px); box-shadow:9px 9px 0 var(--accent); }
  .aw-card .ic { width:48px; height:48px; border-radius:12px; background:var(--accent); color:#fff; font-weight:900; font-size:20px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; margin-bottom:18px; }
  .aw-card h3 { font-weight:800; font-size:21px; letter-spacing:-.4px; margin-bottom:10px; }
  .aw-card p { font-size:15px; color:var(--ink-soft); margin-bottom:16px; }
  .aw-card ul { list-style:none; margin-top:auto; }
  .aw-card li { font-size:14px; font-weight:500; color:var(--ink); padding:6px 0 6px 22px; position:relative; }
  .aw-card li::before { content:""; position:absolute; left:2px; top:12px; width:9px; height:9px; border-radius:3px; background:var(--accent); }

  /* WHY */
  .aw-why { background:var(--ink); color:var(--paper); }
  .aw-why .aw-eyebrow { color:var(--marigold); }
  .aw-why .aw-h2 { color:var(--paper); margin-bottom:46px; }
  .aw-why-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); gap:2px; background:#3A312C; border:2px solid #3A312C; }
  .aw-why-cell { background:var(--ink); padding:32px 30px; }
  .aw-why-cell .n { font-weight:900; font-size:20px; color:var(--accent); margin-bottom:12px; }
  .aw-why-cell:nth-child(2) .n { color:var(--marigold); }
  .aw-why-cell:nth-child(3) .n { color:#4FD1C5; }
  .aw-why-cell:nth-child(4) .n { color:var(--pink); }
  .aw-why-cell h3 { font-weight:800; font-size:20px; letter-spacing:-.3px; margin-bottom:9px; color:var(--paper); }
  .aw-why-cell p { font-size:15.5px; color:#C7BAA8; }

  /* PROCESS */
  .aw-proc .aw-h2 { margin-bottom:46px; }
  .aw-proc-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr); border-top:2px solid var(--ink); border-left:2px solid var(--ink); }
  .aw-step { padding:28px 22px 32px; border-right:2px solid var(--ink); border-bottom:2px solid var(--ink); }
  .aw-step .sn { font-weight:900; font-size:15px; color:#fff; width:38px; height:38px; border-radius:50%; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:var(--accent); margin-bottom:18px; }
  .aw-step h3 { font-weight:800; font-size:19px; margin-bottom:8px; letter-spacing:-.3px; }
  .aw-step p { font-size:15px; color:var(--ink-soft); }

  /* FAQ */
  .aw-faq-grid { max-width:880px; margin:0 auto; border-top:2px solid var(--ink); }
  .aw-faq-item { border-bottom:2px solid var(--ink); }
  .aw-faq-q { width:100%; text-align:left; background:none; border:none; font-family:var(--font); font-weight:700; font-size:clamp(17px,2.1vw,21px); color:var(--ink); padding:24px 50px 24px 0; cursor:pointer; position:relative; letter-spacing:-.3px; }
  .aw-faq-q::after { content:"+"; position:absolute; right:6px; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%); font-size:30px; font-weight:300; color:var(--accent); transition:transform .25s; line-height:1; }
  .aw-faq-item.open .aw-faq-q::after { transform:translateY(-50%) rotate(45deg); }
  .aw-faq-a { max-height:0; overflow:hidden; transition:max-height .32s ease; }
  .aw-faq-a p { font-size:16.5px; color:var(--ink-soft); padding:0 46px 26px 0; }

  /* CONTACT */
  .aw-contact { background:var(--ink); color:var(--paper); }
  .aw-contact-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:56px; align-items:start; }
  .aw-contact-left .aw-eyebrow { color:var(--marigold); }
  .aw-contact-left h2 { font-weight:900; font-size:clamp(34px,4.8vw,64px); line-height:0.98; letter-spacing:-2px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--paper); }
  .aw-contact-left h2 .pink { color:var(--pink); }
  .aw-contact-left .lead { font-size:18px; color:#C7BAA8; margin:20px 0 30px; font-weight:500; }
  .aw-contact-info { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:14px; }
  .aw-ci { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:14px; }
  .aw-ci .ico { width:44px; height:44px; border-radius:11px; background:#241C19; border:1.5px solid #3A312C; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; flex-shrink:0; color:var(--marigold); font-weight:800; }
  .aw-ci span { color:#D6CABA; font-weight:500; font-size:15px; }
  .aw-ci b { display:block; color:var(--paper); font-weight:700; font-size:16px; }
  .aw-map { margin-top:20px; border-radius:16px; overflow:hidden; border:2px solid #3A312C; }
  .aw-map iframe { width:100%; height:200px; border:0; display:block; }
  .aw-contact-card { background:var(--paper); border-radius:20px; padding:38px 34px; text-align:center; }
  .aw-contact-card .cc-icon { width:60px; height:60px; border-radius:16px; background:var(--accent); color:#fff; font-size:28px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; margin:0 auto 20px; }
  .aw-contact-card h3 { font-weight:900; font-size:clamp(24px,3vw,32px); line-height:1.05; letter-spacing:-1px; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:12px; color:var(--ink); }
  .aw-contact-card > p { font-size:16px; color:var(--ink-soft); margin:0 auto 26px; max-width:360px; }
  .aw-contact-card .aw-btn-primary { width:100%; }
  .aw-contact-card .cc-or { font-size:13px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:1.5px; color:var(--ink-soft); margin:24px 0 14px; font-weight:600; }
  .aw-contact-card .cc-links { display:flex; justify-content:center; gap:10px; }
  .aw-contact-card .cc-links a { flex:1; font-weight:700; font-size:14.5px; color:var(--ink); border:2px solid var(--ink); border-radius:40px; padding:11px 0; transition:background .2s,color .2s; }
  .aw-contact-card .cc-links a:hover { background:var(--ink); color:var(--paper); }

  /* FOOTER */
  .aw-footer { background:var(--ink); color:var(--paper); }
  .aw-footer-top { max-width:1320px; margin:0 auto; padding:68px 40px 40px; display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.6fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap:40px; }
  .aw-footer-brand .aw-logo { font-size:44px; color:var(--paper); margin-bottom:16px; }
  .aw-footer-brand p { font-size:15px; color:#C7BAA8; max-width:300px; }
  .aw-fcol h4 { font-size:13px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:1.5px; color:var(--marigold); margin-bottom:16px; font-weight:700; }
  .aw-fcol a { display:block; font-size:15px; color:#D6CABA; padding:5px 0; font-weight:500; transition:color .15s; }
  .aw-fcol a:hover { color:#fff; }
  .aw-footer-bottom { max-width:1320px; margin:0 auto; padding:22px 40px; border-top:1px solid #3A312C; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:20px; flex-wrap:wrap; font-size:13.5px; color:#9C8F82; }
  .aw-social { display:flex; gap:11px; margin-top:22px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
  .aw-social a { width:42px; height:42px; border-radius:50%; border:1.5px solid #3A312C; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; color:#D6CABA; transition:background .2s,color .2s,border-color .2s, transform .12s; }
  .aw-social a:hover { background:var(--pink); border-color:var(--pink); color:#fff; transform:translateY(-2px); }
  .aw-social svg { width:18px; height:18px; fill:currentColor; }

  /* MODAL */
  .aw-modal { position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:400; display:none; align-items:center; justify-content:center; padding:24px; }
  .aw-modal.open { display:flex; }
  .aw-modal-overlay { position:absolute; inset:0; background:rgba(23,17,15,0.62); backdrop-filter:blur(4px); }
  .aw-modal-box { position:relative; z-index:1; background:var(--paper); border-radius:22px; width:100%; max-width:540px; max-height:92vh; overflow-y:auto; padding:36px; border:2px solid var(--ink); animation:aw-pop .3s cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1); }
  @keyframes aw-pop { from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(20px) scale(.97);} to { opacity:1; transform:none;} }
  .aw-modal-close { position:absolute; top:16px; right:16px; width:38px; height:38px; border-radius:50%; border:2px solid var(--ink); background:var(--paper); font-size:22px; line-height:1; cursor:pointer; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; transition:background .2s,color .2s; z-index:2; }
  .aw-modal-close:hover { background:var(--pink); border-color:var(--pink); color:#fff; }
  .aw-modal-head { margin-bottom:22px; padding-right:34px; }
  .aw-modal-head .aw-eyebrow { margin-bottom:10px; color:var(--accent-deep); }
  .aw-modal-head h3 { font-weight:900; font-size:clamp(26px,4vw,34px); line-height:1.02; letter-spacing:-1px; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:10px; }
  .aw-modal-head p { font-size:15.5px; color:var(--ink-soft); }
  .aw-field { margin-bottom:15px; }
  .aw-field label { display:block; font-weight:600; font-size:14px; color:var(--ink); margin-bottom:7px; }
  .aw-field input, .aw-field select, .aw-field textarea { width:100%; font-family:var(--font); font-size:15px; color:var(--ink); background:var(--paper-2); border:2px solid var(--line); border-radius:10px; padding:13px 15px; transition:border-color .2s; }
  .aw-field input:focus, .aw-field select:focus, .aw-field textarea:focus { outline:none; border-color:var(--accent); }
  .aw-field textarea { resize:vertical; min-height:88px; }
  .aw-two { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:15px; }
  .aw-form-submit { width:100%; font-family:var(--font); font-weight:700; font-size:16px; background:var(--pink); color:#fff; border:none; border-radius:40px; padding:16px; cursor:pointer; transition:background .2s; }
  .aw-form-submit:hover { background:var(--pink-deep); }
  .aw-form-note { text-align:center; font-size:12.5px; color:var(--ink-soft); margin-top:12px; }
  .aw-mform-success { display:none; text-align:center; padding:30px 10px; }
  .aw-mform-success.show { display:block; }
  .aw-mform-success .ok { font-weight:900; font-size:24px; color:var(--accent); margin-bottom:8px; }
  .aw-mform-success p { color:var(--ink-soft); font-size:15px; }

  /* WHATSAPP */
  .aw-wa { position:fixed; right:22px; bottom:22px; z-index:300; width:58px; height:58px; border-radius:50%; background:#25D366; box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(37,211,102,0.45); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; transition:transform .2s; }
  .aw-wa:hover { transform:scale(1.08); }
  .aw-wa svg { width:32px; height:32px; }

  /* RESPONSIVE */
  @media (max-width:1024px) {
    .aw-proc-grid { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); }
    .aw-wrap { padding:76px 34px; }
    .aw-cards { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); }
  }
  @media (max-width:980px) {
    .aw-nav { display:none; }
    .aw-header .aw-cta { display:none; }
    .aw-header { padding:12px 18px; }
    .aw-burger { display:flex; }
    .aw-intro-grid, .aw-contact-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; gap:34px; }
    .aw-stats-grid { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); gap:30px 20px; }
    .aw-footer-top { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; }
    .aw-footer-brand { grid-column:1 / -1; }
  }
  @media (max-width:640px) {
    .aw-hero, .aw-wrap, .aw-footer-top, .aw-footer-bottom { padding-left:20px; padding-right:20px; }
    .aw-wrap { padding-top:56px; padding-bottom:56px; }
    .aw-hero h1 { font-size:clamp(40px,13vw,72px); letter-spacing:-1.5px; }
    .aw-cards { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .aw-why-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .aw-proc-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .aw-stats-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .aw-two { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .aw-footer-top { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .aw-hero-actions { width:100%; }
    .aw-hero-actions .aw-btn-primary, .aw-hero-actions .aw-btn-ghost { flex:1; }
    .aw-modal-box { padding:26px 22px; }
    .aw-contact-card { padding:30px 24px; }
  }
  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .aw-faq-a { transition:none; }
    .aw-modal-box { animation:none; }
    * { scroll-behavior:auto; }
  }

  /* ===== extended page components ===== */
  .aw-svc-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:22px;margin-top:18px}
  .aw-svc-card{background:#fff;border:2px solid var(--ink);border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;transition:transform .18s,box-shadow .18s}
  .aw-svc-card:hover{transform:translateY(-5px);box-shadow:8px 8px 0 var(--ink)}
  .aw-svc-card .bar{height:8px;background:var(--sc)}
  .aw-svc-card .in{padding:26px 26px 28px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;flex:1}
  .aw-svc-card .num{font-weight:800;font-size:13px;color:var(--sc);letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:12px}
  .aw-svc-card h3{font-weight:800;font-size:22px;letter-spacing:-.5px;margin-bottom:10px}
  .aw-svc-card>.in>p{font-size:15px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:14px}
  .aw-svc-card .subs{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:20px}
  .aw-svc-card .go{margin-top:auto;font-weight:700;font-size:15px;color:var(--sc);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;transition:gap .2s}
  .aw-svc-card:hover .go{gap:12px}
  @media(max-width:900px){.aw-svc-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}}
  @media(max-width:600px){.aw-svc-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
  .aw-founder{display:grid;grid-template-columns:.82fr 1.18fr;gap:48px;align-items:center}
  .aw-founder .photo{border:3px solid var(--ink);border-radius:22px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:12px 12px 0 var(--accent)}
  .aw-founder .photo img{width:100%;display:block}
  .aw-founder h2{font-weight:900;font-size:clamp(30px,4.4vw,50px);line-height:1;letter-spacing:-1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px}
  .aw-founder .role{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent-deep);font-size:14px;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:20px}
  .aw-founder p{font-size:16.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:14px}
  @media(max-width:820px){.aw-founder{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:28px}.aw-founder .photo{max-width:340px}}
  .aw-values{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:20px;margin-top:18px}
  .aw-val{background:#fff;border:2px solid var(--ink);border-radius:16px;padding:26px 24px}
  .aw-val .vn{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:12px;background:var(--accent);color:#fff;font-weight:800;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:16px;font-size:17px}
  .aw-val h3{font-weight:800;font-size:19px;letter-spacing:-.3px;margin-bottom:8px}
  .aw-val p{font-size:14.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.55}
  @media(max-width:820px){.aw-values{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
  .aw-case-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:24px;margin-top:18px}
  .aw-case{background:#fff;border:2px solid var(--ink);border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;transition:transform .18s,box-shadow .18s}
  .aw-case:hover{transform:translateY(-5px);box-shadow:8px 8px 0 var(--ink)}
  .aw-case .top{padding:30px 30px 0}
  .aw-case .tag{display:inline-block;font-size:11.5px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#fff;background:var(--cc);border-radius:30px;padding:6px 14px;margin-bottom:18px}
  .aw-case h3{font-weight:800;font-size:24px;letter-spacing:-.5px;line-height:1.15;margin-bottom:10px}
  .aw-case .top p{font-size:15px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.55;margin-bottom:22px}
  .aw-case .results{display:flex;gap:30px;padding:22px 30px;border-top:2px solid var(--line);margin-top:auto;background:var(--paper-2)}
  .aw-case .results .r .n{font-weight:900;font-size:27px;color:var(--cc);letter-spacing:-1px;line-height:1}
  .aw-case .results .r .l{font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-soft);font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.4px;margin-top:5px}
  .aw-case a.cta-row{text-decoration:none;color:inherit;display:block}
  @media(max-width:760px){.aw-case-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
  .aw-method-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:20px;margin-top:18px}
  .aw-method{background:#fff;border:2px solid var(--ink);border-radius:16px;padding:32px 26px;text-align:center}
  .aw-method .mi{width:56px;height:56px;border-radius:14px;background:var(--accent);color:#fff;font-size:24px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 18px}
  .aw-method h3{font-weight:800;font-size:19px;margin-bottom:6px;letter-spacing:-.3px}
  .aw-method p{font-size:14px;color:var(--ink-soft);margin-bottom:14px}
  .aw-method a.big{font-weight:800;font-size:17px;color:var(--accent-deep);word-break:break-word}
  .aw-method a.big:hover{text-decoration:underline}
  @media(max-width:820px){.aw-method-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
  /* legal */
  .aw-legal{max-width:820px;margin:0 auto}
  .aw-legal .upd{font-size:14px;color:var(--ink-soft);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:34px}
  .aw-legal h2{font-weight:800;font-size:24px;letter-spacing:-.5px;margin:36px 0 14px}
  .aw-legal h3{font-weight:800;font-size:18px;margin:24px 0 10px}
  .aw-legal p{font-size:16px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.75;margin-bottom:14px}
  .aw-legal ul{margin:0 0 16px 22px}
  .aw-legal li{font-size:16px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:8px}
  .aw-legal a{color:var(--accent-deep);font-weight:600}
  .aw-legal a:hover{text-decoration:underline}
  .aw-legal .note{background:var(--paper-2);border:2px solid var(--line);border-radius:14px;padding:18px 22px;font-size:14.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);margin-top:30px}
  /* utility (404 / thank you) */
  .aw-utility{max-width:640px;margin:0 auto;text-align:center;padding:30px 0 20px}
  .aw-utility .big404{font-weight:900;font-size:clamp(90px,20vw,180px);line-height:.9;letter-spacing:-4px;color:var(--accent)}
  .aw-utility .big404 .dot{color:var(--marigold)}
  .aw-utility h1{font-weight:900;font-size:clamp(30px,5vw,48px);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:-1.5px;margin:10px 0 16px;line-height:1}
  .aw-utility p{font-size:17px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:28px}
  .aw-utility .acts{display:flex;gap:12px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap}
  .aw-utility .tick{width:92px;height:92px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--accent);color:#fff;font-size:46px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 24px}
  /* blog */
  .aw-blog-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:26px;margin-top:18px}
  .aw-post{background:#fff;border:2px solid var(--ink);border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;transition:transform .18s,box-shadow .18s}
  .aw-post:hover{transform:translateY(-5px);box-shadow:8px 8px 0 var(--ink)}
  .aw-post .cover{height:170px;background:var(--pc);display:flex;align-items:flex-end;padding:16px}
  .aw-post .cover .cat{font-size:11.5px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#fff;background:rgba(0,0,0,.3);border-radius:30px;padding:6px 13px}
  .aw-post .pin{padding:22px 24px 26px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;flex:1}
  .aw-post .meta{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:10px}
  .aw-post h3{font-weight:800;font-size:20px;letter-spacing:-.4px;line-height:1.2;margin-bottom:10px}
  .aw-post p{font-size:14.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.55;margin-bottom:16px}
  .aw-post .rd{margin-top:auto;font-weight:700;font-size:14.5px;color:var(--accent-deep)}
  .aw-feat{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.1fr 1fr;background:#fff;border:2px solid var(--ink);border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden;margin-top:18px}
  .aw-feat .fcover{background:var(--accent);min-height:320px;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;padding:24px}
  .aw-feat .fcover .cat{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#fff;background:rgba(0,0,0,.3);border-radius:30px;padding:7px 15px}
  .aw-feat .fin{padding:40px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center}
  .aw-feat .fin .meta{font-size:13px;color:var(--ink-soft);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:14px}
  .aw-feat .fin h2{font-weight:900;font-size:clamp(26px,3.2vw,40px);letter-spacing:-1px;line-height:1.08;margin-bottom:16px}
  .aw-feat .fin p{font-size:16px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:22px}
  @media(max-width:820px){.aw-blog-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.aw-feat{grid-template-columns:1fr}.aw-feat .fcover{min-height:180px}}
  @media(min-width:821px) and (max-width:1050px){.aw-blog-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}}
  /* article */
  .aw-article{max-width:760px;margin:0 auto}
  .aw-article>p{font-size:18px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:20px}
  .aw-article h2{font-weight:800;font-size:28px;letter-spacing:-.8px;margin:38px 0 16px}
  .aw-article h3{font-weight:800;font-size:21px;margin:28px 0 12px}
  .aw-article ul,.aw-article ol{margin:0 0 20px 24px}
  .aw-article li{font-size:18px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.75;margin-bottom:10px}
  .aw-article blockquote{border-left:5px solid var(--accent);background:var(--paper-2);padding:20px 26px;margin:26px 0;border-radius:0 14px 14px 0}
  .aw-article blockquote p{font-size:20px;font-weight:600;color:var(--ink);line-height:1.5;margin:0}
  .aw-article strong{color:var(--ink);font-weight:700}
  .aw-postmeta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;font-size:14.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);font-weight:600;margin-top:20px}
  .aw-postmeta .cat{color:#fff;background:var(--accent);border-radius:30px;padding:6px 14px;font-size:12px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px}
  .aw-authorbox{max-width:760px;margin:40px auto 0;background:#fff;border:2px solid var(--ink);border-radius:18px;padding:28px 30px;display:flex;gap:20px;align-items:center}
  .aw-authorbox .ab-av{width:64px;height:64px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--accent);color:#fff;font-weight:800;font-size:24px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0}
  .aw-authorbox h4{font-weight:800;font-size:18px;margin-bottom:4px}
  .aw-authorbox p{font-size:14.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.55}
  /* pricing */
  .aw-price-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:24px;margin-top:26px;align-items:stretch}
  .aw-price-card{background:#fff;border:2px solid var(--ink);border-radius:20px;padding:34px 30px;display:flex;flex-direction:column}
  .aw-price-card.feat{background:var(--ink);color:var(--paper);position:relative}
  .aw-price-card .badge{position:absolute;top:-13px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:var(--accent);color:#fff;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:6px 16px;border-radius:30px;white-space:nowrap}
  .aw-price-card .pname{font-weight:800;font-size:22px;letter-spacing:-.5px;margin-bottom:8px}
  .aw-price-card .pdesc{font-size:14px;color:var(--ink-soft);margin-bottom:20px;line-height:1.5}
  .aw-price-card.feat .pdesc{color:#C7BAA8}
  .aw-price-card .price{font-weight:900;font-size:38px;letter-spacing:-2px;line-height:1}
  .aw-price-card .price small{font-size:15px;font-weight:600;color:var(--ink-soft);letter-spacing:0}
  .aw-price-card.feat .price small{color:#C7BAA8}
  .aw-price-card .pfrom{font-size:13px;color:var(--ink-soft);font-weight:600;margin:6px 0 22px}
  .aw-price-card.feat .pfrom{color:#C7BAA8}
  .aw-price-card ul{list-style:none;margin:0 0 26px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:11px}
  .aw-price-card li{font-size:14.5px;line-height:1.4;padding-left:26px;position:relative}
  .aw-price-card li::before{content:"\2713";position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--accent);font-weight:800}
  .aw-price-card.feat li::before{color:var(--marigold)}
  .aw-price-card .aw-btn-primary,.aw-price-card .aw-btn-ghost{margin-top:auto;width:100%;text-align:center}
  @media(max-width:900px){.aw-price-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;max-width:440px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto}}
  /* case study */
  .aw-cs-results{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:24px;margin-top:18px}
  .aw-cs-result{background:#fff;border:2px solid var(--ink);border-radius:16px;padding:30px 26px;text-align:center}
  .aw-cs-result .n{font-weight:900;font-size:clamp(38px,5vw,54px);color:var(--accent);letter-spacing:-2px;line-height:1}
  .aw-cs-result .l{font-size:14px;color:var(--ink-soft);font-weight:600;margin-top:10px}
  @media(max-width:760px){.aw-cs-results{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
  .aw-quote{background:var(--ink);color:var(--paper);border-radius:22px;padding:44px 40px;margin-top:14px}
  .aw-quote p{font-size:clamp(20px,2.6vw,28px);font-weight:600;line-height:1.4;letter-spacing:-.5px;margin:0}
  .aw-quote .who{margin-top:20px;font-size:15px;color:var(--marigold);font-weight:700}
  .aw-footer-bottom a{color:inherit;opacity:.85}
  .aw-footer-bottom a:hover{opacity:1;text-decoration:underline}

  /* SEC-CSS reviews + founder note */
  .aw-review-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:22px;margin-top:18px}
  .aw-review{background:#fff;border:2px solid var(--ink);border-radius:18px;padding:28px 26px;display:flex;flex-direction:column}
  .aw-review .stars{color:var(--marigold);font-size:16px;letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:14px}
  .aw-review p{font-size:15.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:20px;flex:1}
  .aw-review .who{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}
  .aw-review .av{width:46px;height:46px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--accent);color:#fff;font-weight:800;font-size:15px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0}
  .aw-review .nm{font-weight:800;font-size:15px;letter-spacing:-.2px}
  .aw-review .rl{font-size:13px;color:var(--ink-soft)}
  @media(max-width:860px){.aw-review-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
  .aw-fnote-inner{display:grid;grid-template-columns:.72fr 1.28fr;gap:44px;align-items:center;background:var(--paper-2);border:2px solid var(--ink);border-radius:22px;padding:42px}
  .aw-fnote .fn-photo{border:3px solid var(--ink);border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:10px 10px 0 var(--accent)}
  .aw-fnote .fn-photo img{width:100%;display:block}
  .aw-fnote .fn-body p{font-size:16px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:14px}
  .aw-fnote .fn-sign{margin-top:22px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px}
  .aw-fnote .fn-sign .fn-mark{width:44px;height:3px;background:var(--accent)}
  .aw-fnote .fn-name{font-weight:800;font-size:19px;letter-spacing:-.3px}
  .aw-fnote .fn-role{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--accent-deep);font-weight:600}
  @media(max-width:820px){.aw-fnote-inner{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:26px;padding:28px}.aw-fnote .fn-photo{max-width:280px}}
  .aw-roles{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px;margin-top:18px}
  .aw-role{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:20px;background:#fff;border:2px solid var(--ink);border-radius:14px;padding:22px 26px;flex-wrap:wrap}
  .aw-role .rl-info h3{font-weight:800;font-size:19px;letter-spacing:-.3px;margin-bottom:4px}
  .aw-role .rl-info p{font-size:14px;color:var(--ink-soft)}
  .aw-role .rl-meta{font-size:13px;color:var(--ink-soft);font-weight:600;display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;margin-top:8px}
  .aw-role .rl-meta .tag{background:var(--paper-2);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:20px;padding:5px 12px}

  <!-- REVIEWS -->
  <section class="aw-wrap aw-reviews">
      <div class="aw-eyebrow">Client reviews</div>
      <h2 class="aw-h2">What clients <span class="g">say.</span></h2>
      <div class="aw-review-grid">
        <div class="aw-review">
          <div class="stars">&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;</div>
          <p>"adwali turned our online presence around completely. We're getting more quality leads than ever, and they actually explain what they're doing and why."</p>
          <div class="who"><div class="av">RM</div><div><div class="nm">Rohit Mehta</div><div class="rl">Founder, Retail Brand</div></div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="aw-review">
          <div class="stars">&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;</div>
          <p>"The team just gets results. Our traffic and sales are both up, and they're genuinely easy to work with. Best marketing partner we've had."</p>
          <div class="who"><div class="av">PA</div><div><div class="nm">Priya Agarwal</div><div class="rl">Marketing Head, D2C Brand</div></div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="aw-review">
          <div class="stars">&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;</div>

          <div class="who"><div class="av">AV</div><div><div class="nm">Amit Verma</div><div class="rl">Director, Services Firm</div></div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
  </section>

  <!-- FOUNDER NOTE -->
  <section class="aw-wrap aw-fnote">
    <div class="aw-fnote-inner">
      <div class="fn-photo"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Shubham Sharma, Founder and CEO of adwali"></div>
      <div class="fn-body">
        <div class="aw-eyebrow">A note from our founder</div>
        <h2 class="aw-h2">Why we <span class="g">do this.</span></h2>
        <p>I started adwali because I was tired of watching brands pour money into marketing that looked busy but changed nothing. I wanted to build the opposite: a team judged by real results, not activity.</p>
        <p>That's still what drives us. We treat every brand we work with like our own, and we genuinely care whether you grow. If that's the kind of team you're after, let's talk.</p>
        <div class="fn-sign"><div class="fn-mark"></div><div><div class="fn-name">Shubham Sharma</div><div class="fn-role">Founder and CEO, adwali</div></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>

  <!-- MODAL -->
  <div class="aw-modal" id="awModal" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="aw-modal-overlay" data-close></div>
    <div class="aw-modal-box" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="Book a free consultation">
      <button class="aw-modal-close" data-close aria-label="Close">&times;</button>
      <div class="aw-modal-head">
        <div class="aw-eyebrow">Free SEO consultation</div>
        <h3>Let's get you ranking.</h3>
        <p>Fill this in and we'll reach out within one business day with a look at where you stand.</p>
      </div>
      <form class="aw-form" id="awModalForm" onsubmit="return awFormSubmit(event)">
        <div class="aw-field"><label>Full name</label><input type="text" name="name" placeholder="Your name" required></div>
        <div class="aw-two">
          <div class="aw-field"><label>Email</label><input type="email" name="email" placeholder="you@company.com" required></div>
          <div class="aw-field"><label>Phone</label><input type="tel" name="phone" placeholder="+91" required></div>
        </div>
        <div class="aw-field"><label>Website URL</label><input type="text" name="website" placeholder="yoursite.com"></div>
        <div class="aw-field"><label>Tell us about your goals</label><textarea name="message" placeholder="What do you want to rank for?"></textarea></div>
        <button type="submit" class="aw-form-submit">Book a Free Consultation</button>
        <div class="aw-form-note">We reply within one business day. Your details stay private.</div>
      </form>
      <div class="aw-mform-success" id="awModalSuccess">
        <div class="ok">Thanks, we've got it!</div>
        <p>Our team will reach out within one business day to set up your free SEO consultation.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <script>
    function awFormSubmit(e){
      e.preventDefault();
      document.getElementById('awModalForm').style.display = 'none';
      document.getElementById('awModalSuccess').classList.add('show');
      return false;
    }
    (function(){
      var burger = document.getElementById('awBurger');
      var mnav = document.getElementById('awMobileNav');
      var modal = document.getElementById('awModal');
      function openForm(){ modal.classList.add('open'); modal.setAttribute('aria-hidden','false'); document.body.classList.add('modal-open'); }
      function closeForm(){ modal.classList.remove('open'); modal.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true'); document.body.classList.remove('modal-open'); }
      if (burger) burger.addEventListener('click', function(){
        var open = mnav.classList.toggle('open');
        document.body.classList.toggle('menu-open', open);
      });
      document.querySelectorAll('.aw-mn-link').forEach(function(l){
        l.addEventListener('click', function(){ mnav.classList.remove('open'); document.body.classList.remove('menu-open'); });
      });
      document.querySelectorAll('[data-openform]').forEach(function(b){
        b.addEventListener('click', function(e){ e.preventDefault(); openForm(); });
      });
      modal.querySelectorAll('[data-close]').forEach(function(c){ c.addEventListener('click', closeForm); });
      document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e){ if (e.key === 'Escape') closeForm(); });
      document.querySelectorAll('.aw-faq-q').forEach(function(q){
        q.addEventListener('click', function(){
          var item = q.parentElement;
          var a = item.querySelector('.aw-faq-a');
          var isOpen = item.classList.contains('open');
          document.querySelectorAll('.aw-faq-item').forEach(function(i){ i.classList.remove('open'); i.querySelector('.aw-faq-a').style.maxHeight = null; });
          if (!isOpen) { item.classList.add('open'); a.style.maxHeight = a.scrollHeight + 'px'; }
        });
      });
    })();
  </script>
